---
title: ""
---

::: {#home .hero}

<video id="hero-video" class="hero-video" autoplay muted loop playsinline
       poster="favicon.svg" preload="metadata"
       aria-hidden="true"></video>

::: {.hero-overlay}
:::

::: {.hero-content}
::: {.hero-badge .fade-in-up .delay-1}
[]{.status-dot} Based in Spain - building data products that run
:::

# Progress <span class="accent">in</span> Motion {.hero-title .fade-in-up .delay-2}

[Data Analyst · BI · ETL — turning raw data into pipelines, dashboards, and forecasts that ship.]{.hero-subtitle .fade-in-up .delay-3}

::: {.hero-actions .fade-in-up .delay-4}
[See my work](#work){.btn .btn-primary .glow-btn}
[Let's talk](#contact){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
:::
:::

<a href="#about" class="scroll-cue" aria-label="Scroll to about section"><span>scroll</span><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"/></svg></a>

:::

::: {.marquee aria-hidden="true"}
::: {.marquee-track}
[Python ✦ SQL ✦ Tableau ✦ Power BI ✦ dbt ✦ Airflow ✦ BigQuery ✦ Snowflake ✦ Docker ✦ GCP ✦ Looker ✦ Spark]{.marquee-chunk}
[Python ✦ SQL ✦ Tableau ✦ Power BI ✦ dbt ✦ Airflow ✦ BigQuery ✦ Snowflake ✦ Docker ✦ GCP ✦ Looker ✦ Spark]{.marquee-chunk}
:::
:::

::: {#about}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
about me
:::

## Who I <span class="serif-accent">Am</span> {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.about-intro}

::: {.glass-panel .profile-card .float-bob .fade-in}

::: {.profile-img-container}
::: {.profile-initials}
MW
:::
:::

## Maximo Williner {.profile-name}

::: {.title-badge}
Data Analyst - BI - ETL
:::

::: {.card-stats}
::: {.stat}
[42 Madrid]{.stat-val .gradient-text}
[Piscine & Common Core]{.stat-label}
:::
::: {.stat}
[100% Code]{.stat-val .gradient-text}
[Python · SQL · C]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.specialties}
[Python]{.badge} [C]{.badge} [SQL]{.badge} [Marketing]{.badge}
:::

:::

::: {.glass-panel .text-card .fade-up}
Data & Software Developer trained at 42 Madrid. I combine low-level programming rigor (C/Python, SQL) with strategic marketing knowledge to turn raw, unstructured data into high-value business pipelines. My focus sits at the intersection of analytics engineering and web tools: building scrapers, managing databases, and embedding real-time analytics into web applications.
:::

:::

::: {.about-grid}

::: {.glass-panel .stats-card .fade-in}
::: {.stat-grid}

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>
:::

[Python + SQL]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[Core stack]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="10"/><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="14"/></svg>
:::

[Tableau / Power BI]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[BI delivery]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.stat-box}
::: {.neon-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="23 4 23 10 17 10"/><polyline points="1 20 1 14 7 14"/><path d="M3.51 9a9 9 0 0 1 14.85-3.36L23 10M1 14l4.64 4.36A9 9 0 0 0 20.49 15"/></svg>
:::

[Airflow + dbt]{.stat-val .gradient-text}

[ETL automation]{.stat-label}
:::

:::
:::

:::

## What I <span class="serif-accent">Work</span> With {.section-title .fade-up}

::: {.skills-container}

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Languages

::: {.skill-chips}
[Python]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [PostgreSQL]{.chip} [BigQuery]{.chip} [Snowflake]{.chip} [R]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Visualization / BI

::: {.skill-chips}
[Tableau]{.chip} [Power BI]{.chip} [Looker]{.chip} [Metabase]{.chip} [Plotly]{.chip} [Seaborn]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Infrastructure / ETL

::: {.skill-chips}
[Airflow]{.chip} [dbt]{.chip} [Spark]{.chip} [DuckDB]{.chip} [Docker]{.chip} [GCP]{.chip}
:::
:::

::: {.skill-category .glass-panel .fade-in}
### Methods

::: {.skill-chips}
[Cohort analysis]{.chip} [Forecasting]{.chip} [A/B testing]{.chip} [Attribution]{.chip} [Data modeling]{.chip}
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {#work}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
selected work
:::

## <span class="serif-accent">Projects</span> {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.projects-grid .fade-in}

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v1}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
<div class="mini-chart chart-bars" aria-hidden="true"><span style="--h:38%"></span><span style="--h:56%"></span><span style="--h:46%"></span><span style="--h:68%"></span><span style="--h:60%"></span><span style="--h:84%"></span><span style="--h:74%"></span></div>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Job Market Scraper & Analytics {.accent}

Automated web scraper aggregating job listings across platforms into a SQL database with Streamlit analytics.

::: {.tech-stack}
[Python]{.chip} [APIs]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [Streamlit]{.chip}
:::

<a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/maxiwilliner" aria-label="Job Market Scraper on GitHub">GitHub <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"/><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"/></svg></a>
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v2}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
<div class="mini-chart chart-line" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 200 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="5,80 35,66 62,73 92,48 122,56 152,28 195,14" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="195" cy="14" r="4"/></svg></div>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Unit Economics & Cohort Analyzer {.accent}

Python toolkit for customer lifetime value, retention cohorts, and marketing channel attribution.

::: {.tech-stack}
[Python]{.chip} [Pandas]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [Marketing]{.chip}
:::

<a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/maxiwilliner" aria-label="Unit Economics Analyzer on GitHub">GitHub <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"/><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"/></svg></a>
:::
:::

::: {.project-card .glass-panel}
::: {.project-visual}
::: {.mock-browser .v3}
<div class="browser-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
::: {.mock-content}
<div class="mini-chart chart-forecast" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 200 100" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path class="hist" d="M5 72 C 28 58, 45 80, 70 62 S 108 42, 128 54" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/><path class="proj" d="M128 54 C 148 64, 168 30, 195 38" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div>
:::
:::
:::
::: {.project-info}
### Algorithms & System Tooling {.accent}

Low-level algorithms and Unix system utilities built in C — memory allocators, data structures, shell tools.

::: {.tech-stack}
[C]{.chip} [Algorithms]{.chip} [Unix]{.chip} [Git]{.chip}
:::

<a class="project-link" href="https://github.com/maxiwilliner" aria-label="Algorithms & System Tooling on GitHub">GitHub <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"/><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"/></svg></a>
:::
:::

:::

:::

::: {#experience}

::: {.section-header}
::: {.section-badge .fade-up}
track record
:::

## <span class="serif-accent">Experience</span> {.section-title .fade-up .stagger-1}
:::

::: {.case-studies-list .fade-in}

::: {.case-study-card .glass-panel}
[]{.tl-dot}

::: {.cs-meta}
[Full-time]{.cs-tag} [Reporting]{.cs-tag} [Jan 2023 — Present]{.cs-date}
:::

::: {.cs-content}
### Data Analyst - [Acme Corp](https://example.com) {.accent}

Designed executive KPI dashboards in Tableau for 30+ stakeholders. Automated reporting pipelines with Python + Airflow, cutting manual work ~15 hrs/week. Partnered with product on A/B analysis and retention modeling.

::: {.cs-outcomes}
::: {.cs-stat}
[30+]{.cs-stat-val data-count="30" data-suffix="+"}
[stakeholders]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[15h]{.cs-stat-val data-count="15" data-suffix="h"}
[saved weekly]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[3]{.cs-stat-val data-count="3"}
[cohorts modeled]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.cs-stack}
[Tableau]{.chip} [Python]{.chip} [Airflow]{.chip} [dbt]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.case-study-card .glass-panel}
[]{.tl-dot}

::: {.cs-meta}
[Full-time]{.cs-tag} [Marketing]{.cs-tag} [2021 — 2022]{.cs-date}
:::

::: {.cs-content}
### Junior Data Analyst - Beta Analytics {.accent}

Built ETL jobs in SQL (BigQuery) for marketing spend attribution. Created Looker dashboards tracking CAC, LTV, and payback period. Documented data models in dbt for the analytics engineering team.

::: {.cs-outcomes}
::: {.cs-stat}
[15+]{.cs-stat-val data-count="15" data-suffix="+"}
[reports automated]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[3]{.cs-stat-val data-count="3"}
[attribution models]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
::: {.cs-stat}
[100%]{.cs-stat-val data-count="100" data-suffix="%"}
[dbt documented]{.cs-stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.cs-stack}
[BigQuery]{.chip} [Looker]{.chip} [SQL]{.chip} [dbt]{.chip}
:::
:::
:::

:::

## Education & <span class="serif-accent">Certifications</span> {.section-title .fade-up}

::: {.cert-grid .fade-in}

::: {.cert-card .glass-panel}
::: {.cert-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 10 12 5 2 10l10 5 10-5Z"/><path d="M6 12v5c0 1 2.5 2 6 2s6-1 6-2v-5"/></svg>
:::

### 42 Madrid

**Software Engineering & Data Fundamentals**

Peer-to-peer methodology, algorithms, memory management, and Unix environment.
:::

::: {.cert-card .glass-panel}
::: {.cert-icon}
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
:::

### Vocational Education (GS)

**Marketing & Commercial Management**

Market research, consumer metrics, and funnels. (TFG pending).
:::

:::

:::

::: {#contact .site-footer}

::: {.footer-top .glass-panel .fade-in}

::: {.contact-info}

## Got a <span class="serif-accent">project?</span> {.contact-title}

[Let's talk.]{.contact-lede}

Open to full-time Data Analyst / BI Engineer roles and freelance dashboard projects. Based in Argentina, working globally.

:::

::: {.btn-row}
[Email me](mailto:maximowilliner35@gmail.com){.btn .btn-primary .glow-btn}
<button class="btn btn-secondary glass-btn copy-email" type="button" data-email="maximowilliner35@gmail.com">Copy email</button>
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/maximo-williner-12155a292/){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
[GitHub](https://github.com/maxiwilliner){.btn .btn-secondary .glass-btn}
:::

:::

::: {.footer-bottom}
[Maximo Williner]{.brand}
[Built with Quarto - (c) 2026]{.copyright}
:::

:::
